forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+---
+depends_on:
+- 01KWFNRM5VSWGD37H2YJ7CMBN2
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '8380'
+title: 'M3a: ArgumentMarshaler â€” JSValue â‡„ GeneratedContent'
+---
+## What
+Per plan.md M3 (marshaling half):
+- `Sources/FoundationModelsMultitool/Invocation/ArgumentMarshaler.swift`
+- **In:** JS argument object (`JSValue`) â†’ `GeneratedContent(properties:id:)` built natively from key/values (no schema, no JSON string; `init(json:)` as the alternative path where natural). Handle string/number (int vs double)/bool/null/array/nested object; omitted optionals stay absent.
+- **Out:** tool `Output` â†’ JS value: structured `Output`'s `GeneratedContent.jsonString` â†’ `JSON.parse` into a JS object; plain-text `Output` â†’ JS string.
+- **Pin (plan Finding #4):** the exact accessor for `ToolOutput` â†’ underlying `GeneratedContent` (DocC page 404'd) â€” resolve against the compiled SDK; worst case render via `PromptRepresentable` text and document it.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] Round-trip: a JS object marshals to `GeneratedContent` whose `properties()` match key-for-key, and back out to an equal JS value
+- [ ] Int-valued numbers marshal as integers; fractional as doubles
+- [ ] Omitted optional fields are absent (not null) in the marshaled content
+- [ ] Structured vs text `Output` render to object vs string respectively; the `ToolOutput` accessor pin is resolved and noted in code docs
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] `Tests/FoundationModelsMultitoolTests/ArgumentMarshalerTests.swift` â€” round-trips for every scalar type, arrays, nesting, null/absent optionals; structured + text output rendering
+- [ ] `swift test --filter ArgumentMarshalerTests` â†’ passes
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` â€” write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
\ No newline at end of file
